description.value:
Requirements You're in quadrupedal posture.

You trot forth, crushing your enemies under your feet! You Stride up to double your Speed and can move through the spaces of creatures at least one size smaller than you, trampling each creature whose space you enter. You can attempt to trample the same creature only once in a single Trampling Stride. You deal bludgeoning damage equal to your fist unarmed attack against these creatures with a basic Reflex save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.
